description: "Architecture patterns for Next.js 15 projects. Use when creating routes, organizing files, planning deployment, or making structural decisions."

# Architecture Skill

> Compiled from ADR-0001 (Architecture).

## Pattern Files

| File | Use When |
|------|----------|
| `nextjs15.patterns.md` | Next.js 15 App Router patterns, async APIs, route segments, special files |
| `structure-naming.patterns.md` | File organization, naming conventions, feature scoping, barrel exports |
| `docker-deployment.patterns.md` | Docker containerization, multi-stage builds, deployment configuration |

## Key Constraints

See `instructions/app.instructions.md` for constraint rules.
